message:
fix: skip gt dolt start fallback in test mode (bd-kyu)

When tests run from a Gas Town worktree (e.g., refinery), IsDaemonManaged()
returns true via path heuristics. If the test dolt server is unreachable,
newServerMode falls through to the IsDaemonManaged branch and tries to run
`gt dolt start`, which fails with "not in a Gas Town workspace" when the
worktree is outside the normal Gas Town directory tree.

Fix: add BEADS_TEST_MODE guard to the IsDaemonManaged branch. Tests manage
their own server lifecycle via testutil.StartTestDoltServer and should never
trigger gt dolt start.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/obsidian
